programme.title: Mr. D: Late Shift
programme.desc: Gerry takes a second job at Barrels to pay for a new car but struggles to juggle both.

programme.title: Mr. D: World Religions
programme.desc: Gerry's 'World Religions' unit goes off course when he brings his personal views into the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Overnight Trip
programme.desc: Gerry concocts a scheme to get his class to go to Boston so that he and Bill can watch a Celtics game.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Crush
programme.desc: Gerry develops a crush on the Scottish mother of one of his most annoying students.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Other Woman
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Date
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Favourite Couple
programme.desc: Xavier's favourite senior couple, Sean and Miranda ('Searanda'), are on the rocks. Seeing himself in Sean, Gerry decides to meddle in their relationship - they have to stay together or Gerry will suffer a deep personal loss.

programme.title: Mr. D: Poker Night
programme.desc: When Gerry comes across a down and out Daniel Negreanu, he orchestrates a staff poker night in order to get Daniel back on his feet.

programme.title: Mr. D: Staff Retreat
programme.desc: The staff are involved in an elaborate trust game that accidently reveals some of their darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mr. D: Culture Day
programme.desc: Culture Day at Xavier and each teacher has been asked to model their classroom after a country. Gerry pushes for Scotland, only to find that Dwyer already has it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Strip Club
programme.desc: Gerry suspects that Dwyer is moonlighting as a stripper and there's only one way to find out for sure. Gerry and Simon are going to spend a night at the strip club...an all male strip club.

programme.title: Mr. D: Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Gerry tries to convince Bobbi to give him a senior boys basketball team next season. Robert learns that his year end evaluation came with one complaint.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: A mother makes a rap video for her college-age son, two grifters try to con each other, and Big Boi has a chance encounter with Andre 3000 at a coffee shop.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: A brainstorming session for Gremlins 2 goes off the rails, a criminal snitches on his friends and a party guest tries to hide his ignorance about global politics.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson schools his wife on the multiverse theory, the valets get pumped about Game of Thrones, and a telemarketer employs an unexpected strategy.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: Andre and Meegan have a serious talk, a rapper runs into trouble while trying to storm out of an interview, and an airline passenger adapts to life in economy plus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End
programme.desc: Ghostbusters singer Ray Parker Jr. unveils his lesser-known songs, a young man is transported to a magical land, and Jordan and Keegan reach their final destination.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I Said Bitch
programme.desc: Jordan and Keegan trade stories about a forbidden word, while President Obama's anger gets translated.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Hawk Up
programme.desc: President Obama rap battles, and a traffic reporter has some trouble flying.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nail Salon/Fun
programme.desc: Nathan discovers a snafu in his plan to offer valet services at a nail salon and embarks on a mission to prove that people enjoy his company.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Hero
programme.desc: Nathan organizes a death-defying stunt in an attempt to turn a regular guy into a national hero.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nathan For You: A Celebration
programme.desc: Anthony Napoli and Nathan revisit some of the people the show has helped, including a ghost realtor, a teen vandal and a centerfold-turned-private eye.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Richards Tip
programme.desc: Nathan stages an elaborate stunt to make it seem like comedian Michael Richards left a $10,000 tip at a deli.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Chili Shop/Massage Parlor
programme.desc: Nathan devises a method of selling chili in secret and founds a charity to help a massage parlor upsell its clients.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Andy vs. Uber
programme.desc: Nathan reteams with an old client to enlist several disgruntled taxi drivers for a plot to sabotage Uber's business from the inside.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Anecdote
programme.desc: Nathan goes to great lengths to create the perfect talk show anecdote.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Shipping Logistics Company
programme.desc: Nathan teaches an international exporter how to ship smoke alarms tax-free.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Computer Repair/Psychic
programme.desc: Nathan helps a computer repair shop earn the public's trust, and a psychic's marketing turns personal.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Yogurt Shop/Pizzeria
programme.desc: Nathan introduces a controversial frozen yogurt flavor and hatches a plan for eight-minute pizza delivery.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Santa/Petting Zoo
programme.desc: Nathan stages a viral video to put a petting zoo on the map and sets up a "Santa in the Summer" photoshoot at a mall.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Gas Station/Caricature Artist
programme.desc: Nathan devises the world's greatest rebate to help an independent gas station and transforms a fledgling caricature artist into the King of Sting.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Army Spoon
programme.desc: Gerald photographs Appa and his spoon for an exhibit. Janet's apology for a restaurant faux pas doesn't go well. Umma receives an alarming call.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Kim Cup
programme.desc: An old ping-pong table rekindles a rivalry between Appa and Jung. Umma sets out to bond with Janet but finds Chelsea to be more receptive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Rampage
programme.desc: The Mala Noche gang trial is stopped when the defendant escapes with the help of a fake witness and a gunman in the audience. Delko finds that a beautiful but disturbed ex-lover is stalking any woman who he is now close too, including his sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko search Miami to bring down the Mala Noche gang once and for all. The quest to end the crime-spree is jeopardized when Federal agents, led by Agent Glen Cole, raid the CSI lab searching for missing cash evidence, based on an unknown tip.
programme.sub-title: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Family Business
programme.desc: When heirs to a store chain are arrested for murder, their father tries to protect them.

programme.title: Law & Order: Entrapment
programme.desc: A young woman acting as an FBI informant successfully frames her friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Legacy
programme.desc: An angry woman hires a hit man to take care of things.

programme.title: Law & Order: Menace
programme.desc: Ross sets about proving that a known bully is responsible for a girl's suicide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Barter
programme.desc: A financial planner's death reveals the sleazy activities of a loan company.

programme.title: Law & Order: Matrimony
programme.desc: After a wealthy man is murdered, it appears those close to him were after his inheritance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Working Mom
programme.desc: A working mother is accused of prostitution and murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: D Girl
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis head to LA to get a blood sample after a torso is found in the river.

programme.title: Law & Order: Turnaround
programme.desc: The investigation into Ellison's murder progresses.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler discovers a Croatian war criminal has been granted amnesty, and must struggle with demons from his own past in Bosnia.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Three American soldiers plunge into the Niagara River and swim to Canada. Deserters, refusing to return to Iraq under the U.S.’s “stop loss” policy, they seek refugee status in Canada.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: An international assassin, Monita Persaud, turns up in downtown Toronto. Her target: a political cartoonist who has enraged the Muslim world. The ICS squad tracks down Persaud, only to discover a more ominous conspiracy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash And Burn
programme.desc: An elderly lady drives her car recklessly into a café for no apparent reason. Meanwhile, a wife dies of carbon monoxide poisoning while her husband does not even though he was sleeping right next to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Precious Metal
programme.desc: A badly decomposed body of a man is found in a chemical waste barrel. The markings on the barrel indicates that it came from a warehouse, now used as an arena for specially-built remote-controlled robots to destroy each other.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Night At The Movies
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an art house cinema while a young shooting victim is found in a storage room with a bizarrely wide bullet hole pattern.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: After his dramatic exit, the Geordies come to terms with life after Kyle. Chloe's plan to make Scott jealous backfires and Charlotte gives Holly some very tough love. (S11, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Chloe confronts Scott and lets slip how she truly feels. Meanwhile, Marnie gets an unexpected call while Nathan has some big news for the family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Charlotte finally turns up with some bunnies and some bigger news for Gaz. Will Holly share her secret? Aaron and Scott's dates with Chantelle end badly as the lads and Chloe all kick off. (S12, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Charlotte gets the girls to go hard on Gaz, Scott drops the girlfriend bomb on Chantelle and Holly has a big bust up with Charlotte when she sees her kissing Chloe. (S12, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: With Holly away, Chloe and Charlotte's friendship goes next level. Chantelle's plan to test Scott goes badly wrong and Chloe is quick to take advantage. (S12, ep4)
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Gaz and Charlotte spend the night together, Chloe finally comes clean to Chantelle over what she gave Scott and it all kicks off. Plus there's one huge shock when Marnie returns. (S12, ep5)

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It’s one of the tensest swaps yetas 32 year old monster portion king James Collier goes head to head with uninterested undereater 31 year old ModasserZafar.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: We’re revisiting Louise Sapsford, boredom binger Tracy Morgan and too lazy to eat Alex Law and finding out 3 years down the line if their time in the feeding clinic did anything to change their disastrous diets.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Jade weighs just five and half stone, and is desperate to regain her pre-pregnancy size for the sake of her young son. Julie, binges on huge platefuls of home cooked food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: On tonight’s emotional show we revisit 4 people from last series who were in the grip of the life threatening eating disorder, anorexia.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Food hater Louise swaps diets with 39-year-old biker Eddie, who needs to change his diet before it's too late. And Anna Richardson gives up on perfection and accepts what she was born with.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Phillipa is a 48 year old ‘foodie’ from Sheffield who just can’t say no. Gillian is a 24 year old student nurse from Inverness and single mum of two.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Don't Push It
programme.desc: Three emergency deliveries in the ER cause a turf war with the labor and delivery department; two gunshot victims have a surprising connection; an unidentified jogger goes into a coma and the ER staff becomes detectives trying to find the woman's family.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Holiday ER
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a man dressed as Santa is near death - his wife asks his doctor for a special favor: harvest her husband's semen. A man can't breathe because a live fish is stuck in his throat.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Beyond Recognition
programme.desc: A man's face and body suddenly double in size; an ER physician races to determine why a young woman is burning up from the inside out after a day at the beach; a grumpy old man nearly dies before revealing an emotional secret.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Death Breath
programme.desc: An ER nurse brings her delirious husband to the ER, then notices that his breath smells like mothballs. A young mother delivers her baby, then goes into life-threatening convulsions. Identical twin doctors create hilarious confusion in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Life & Limb Too
programme.desc: A pregnant woman's leg pain turns out to be flesh-eating virus, threatening life and limb. A Desert Storm war veteran swallows razor blades on a dare, and a bride-to-be spends her wedding day in the ER after collapsing at the altar.

programme.title: Hit By A Train
programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Baby Blues
programme.desc: Real life stories of medical emergencies. Follow the case of a boy with an oxygen deficiency and bizarre brown blood. Meanwhile, a man has his arm stuck in a meat grinder, and he's losing blood.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twists & Turns
programme.desc: A violent convict may be faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan; a young man seems to be suffocating for no apparent reason; a father is stabbed in the heart trying to protect his son; a college cheerleader mysteriously goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Coffee Enemas/Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband Mike have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Grown-Up Baby
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Spin Cycle_Newborn Dolls
programme.desc: Fred and Robert have a rare collection of vintage washing machines. They’ve over $40,000 to compile this one-of-a-kind collection. Lynn has created over 1,800 life-like vinyl newborn dolls.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Christmas Spcl 1
programme.desc: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection takes you inside the lives of extreme collectors who have taken holiday decorating to the max. For these obsessed collectors, it's Christmas year round.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.
programme.sub-title: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Casting / Psychics
programme.desc: Profiled are Kevin, who constantly covers his body in plaster casts even though he is not injured, and Melissa who is incapable of making a decision without a consulting a psychic.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Drinks Nail Polish & Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years but her family is worried she's doing permanent damage to her health. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Sucker/Bodybuilder
programme.desc: Lauren was once addicted to drugs and alcohol, but now is addicted to body-building, which may have caused long term health problems. Meanwhile, Rhonda has been addicted to sucking her thumb ever since her parents divorced when she was a child.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 1)
programme.desc: The King is back, baby! Daryl King is known to make an entrance, and he wants the houses he shows to have that same "wow" factor. His clients are looking for a grand mansion

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Daryl be able to dazzle his clients and find a property that will take their breath away?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)
programme.desc: International luxury realtor Mike Donia jets off to Thailand to work with a client and good friend of his, Mae. She is moving back to her hometown of Bangkok to pursue her modeling career, and is looking for the house of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 2)
programme.desc: Unfortunately for Rosa, she isn't seeing the benefits of moving to a town around Cambridge. Steve's got some neat ideas, but will they be able to convince Rosa? This episode features the last two of four properties.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads to the island of Ambergris Caye, Belize to help a friend and former client, actress and choreographer Zuzana Marosová. As a public figure, Zuzana craves privacy in her personal time and is looking for a relaxing space.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local realtor Daniel Hartin, Sofie sets her sights on the perfect home...and hopefully a bit of fun in the sun! This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the client decides to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS: Cops That's My Grill
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Drive and Dash
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Pinky Promise
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Dead End Dash
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.
programme.sub-title: Cops Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

programme.title: COPS: Cops Pants Party
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Smooth Move
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Highway to Jail
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS: Cops Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.
